updates.title: Watchdog and stall detector added
updates.detail: Created a persistent stall detector, dashboard-triggered fallback, watchdog status files, and Stall Risk dashboard column.

updates.title: Controller schedule re-enabled
updates.detail: Autonomous controller task was enabled and relaunched so future progress does not depend on Codex.

updates.title: Autonomous progress visibility added
updates.detail: Dashboard now shows recent achievements, heartbeat freshness, stall-watch state, and whether Codex is needed.

updates.title: Phone-readable dashboard published
updates.detail: Generated a rendered HTML dashboard and mirrored it to the public repository.

updates.title: Controller/PlatformGate reliability patched
updates.detail: Bounded checkpoint publishing, child-active detection, orphan-lock recovery, and 15-minute stale-progress recovery were added.

updates.title: PlatformGate cycle relaunched locally
updates.detail: Detached PlatformGate restarted with catalogue expansion still disabled.
